ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the interaction (F for university to industry, R for industry to university) */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university involved in the interaction */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry partner involved in the interaction */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency or duration of the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of interaction (e.g., meeting, research collaboration) */,
  "interaction_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction topic */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the interaction record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the interaction record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_interaction_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_topic_id") REFERENCES interaction_topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the university */,
  "main_contact" TEXT /* Name of the main contact person at the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the university's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number for the university */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was established */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "number_of_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "research_areas" TEXT /* Key research areas or departments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry partner */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry partner */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Sector of the industry (e.g., Technology, Manufacturing) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the industry partner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the industry partner */,
  "main_contact" TEXT /* Name of the main contact person at the industry partner */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the industry partner's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number for the industry partner */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the industry partner was established */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees */,
  "annual_revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the industry partner */,
  "key_products" TEXT /* Key products or services offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, planned) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university involved in the project */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry partner involved in the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the project */,
  "project_outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project outcome */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_outcome_id") REFERENCES project_outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the interaction type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the interaction type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction detail */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction the detail belongs to */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic discussed during the interaction */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "interaction_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction topic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the interaction detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction detail was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the interaction detail */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_details_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_details_interaction_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_topic_id") REFERENCES interaction_topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, industry partner) */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry partner the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed (e.g., interaction_id, project_id) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity being accessed (e.g., interaction, project) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the topic */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project outcome */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the project outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the project outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., milestone, publication) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the outcome */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_outcomes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
